scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the current OutputSettings field
scenarios.precondition: Document instance created via new Document("http://example.com"); uses real OutputSettings
scenarios.expectedResult: returned value is the same instance as doc.outputSettings() initially held

scenarios.description: outputSettings(OutputSettings) with non-null argument sets field and returns this Document
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://ex"); real OutputSettings newSettings = new OutputSettings();
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the same as original; doc.outputSettings() == newSettings

scenarios.description: outputSettings(OutputSettings) with null argument throws IllegalArgumentException
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://ex"); verifies Validate.notNull behavior
